comments: Approved. The execution contract bounds the work to documentation/presentation changes: rewriting the root README.md, adding README_zh-CN.md, updating documentation center links, and producing task-local review artifacts under tasks/v0.8-readme-overhaul/. The out_of_scope section correctly forbids modifications to src/ or bin/ logic, runtime execution code, and active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state semantics outside patch progression. Allowed files are consistent with the bounded documentation task, and stop conditions explicitly prevent source/bin changes or execution without approved contract.
